---
title: "test_sterling_auditor.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\unit\test_sterling_auditor.py"
loc: 43
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.65
style_score: 3.64
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.25
---

## Intent
The `test_sterling_auditor.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on auditor, test_audit_file_tarnished, test_audit_file_silver, test_audit_file_polished. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via auditor, test_audit_file_tarnished, test_audit_file_silver, test_audit_file_polished. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sterling_auditor](file://src.core.sterling_auditor)

### Exports
- `auditor`
- `test_audit_file_tarnished`
- `test_audit_file_silver`
- `test_audit_file_polished`
